basic_details.job_title: CMHO Rajnandgaon Gynecologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Chief Medical and Health Office Rajnandgaon (CMHO Rajnandgaon)
basic_details.short_information: The Chief Medical and Health Office Rajnandgaon (CMHO Rajnandgaon) has officially announced the Gynecologist Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 25 May 2026 at rajnandgaon.nic.in. Candidates who meet the minimum age criteria of 18 years and hold a Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology with valid Medical Council registration can now submit their offline applications from 25 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in the relevant specialty or Diploma in Obstetrics and Gynaecology from a recognized university; valid live registration with Chhattisgarh or other state Medical Council or Indian Medical Council

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.rajnandgaon.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
